overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a nighttime walk through Lamia's Farm. The player character walks with a companion along dirt paths through cornfields and past wooden farm structures under a bright full moon, encountering a dog and torch-lit buildings before ascending a hillside path.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path through cornfields with wooden log crossing

events.description: crossing over wooden logs laid across the dirt path
approaching wooden farm gate structure at the end of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt farm path following a companion wearing a wide-brimmed hat

notable_agents.action: companion walking ahead on the path wearing traditional Greek farm clothing and a conical hat

entered.detail: tall golden corn stalks growing in organized rows behind wooden fencing
logs laid across the dirt path forming a makeshift crossing
rustic wooden fence bordering the cornfield
wooden farm gate structure marking the entrance to the main farm area

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a nighttime farm path with the player character following a companion. Tall cornfields line the right side behind wooden fences. The path features logs laid across it as a crossing, and the pair approaches a wooden gate structure leading deeper into the farm.

scene_state.functional_zone: open farm clearing with rocky outcrops and scattered olive trees

events.description: full moon becomes visible in the night sky illuminating the scene with blue-white light
approaching wooden farm shelter and stone buildings built into the hillside

agents.ego_description: continuing through the open farm area with companion, moonlight revealing distant mountains and farm structures

notable_agents.action: companion walking alongside looking toward the farm buildings ahead

entered.detail: open-air wooden pavilion with roof supported by wooden posts
large boulders and rocky terrain lining the path
stone and wood farm structure built into the hillside with multiple levels
bright full moon illuminating the night sky

segments.scene_description: Exiting the cornfield area, the scene opens up to reveal a bright full moon and distant mountains. The path winds through rocky terrain toward a wooden shelter on the left and stone farm buildings built into the hillside on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: farm center with wooden cart, animals, and torch-lit building ahead

events.description: dog runs across the path from right to left and stops near the character
approaching building entrance illuminated by a burning fire torch

agents.ego_description: walking through the farm center passing a wooden cart and interacting with a dog, heading toward a lit building

notable_agents.action: dog running across the path and stopping to look at the character

entered.detail: large wooden farm cart with wooden wheels parked beside the path
flaming torch on a post illuminating the building entrance with orange light
stack of hay or straw near the wooden shelter

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the central farm area, passing a wooden shelter and a parked cart. A dog runs across the path and stops nearby. Ahead, a building entrance glows with torchlight, while the full moon continues to illuminate the scene from above.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky hillside path ascending away from the farm

events.description: turning right to ascend the narrow hillside path away from the farm buildings
entering tree-covered hillside trail leaving the farm buildings behind

agents.ego_description: turning up a narrow dirt path ascending the rocky hillside away from the farm, leaving the companion behind

entered.detail: steep rocky hillside with dirt path winding upward
evergreen trees lining the uphill path

segments.scene_description: Passing the torch-lit building, the character turns right onto a narrow path ascending a rocky hillside. The farm structures fall behind as the path enters a more enclosed area with pine trees and wooden fencing, continuing upward into the darker hillside terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit farmstead that gradually transitions from open cornfields to a secluded, ascending hillside. It begins on a dirt path where the player character follows a companion past wooden fences and tall cornfields, crossing logs on the ground before passing through a wooden gate. As the path opens up, the view expands to reveal a bright full moon and distant mountains, with the terrain shifting to rocky ground flanked by a wooden shelter and stone buildings. The scene then moves through the central farm area past a parked cart and a running dog, drawing closer to a building entrance glowing with warm torchlight. Finally, the camera turns right and climbs a narrow path, leaving the farm structures behind as it enters a darker, enclosed area of pine trees and wooden fencing on the rocky hillside.
